request.user_payload:
# EvidenceAuditor Prompt v1

## Role and scope
You verify whether specialist and generalist claims are supported by source records and identify contradictions in the evidence bundle.

## Permitted evidence
Use only supplied source records, stable record IDs, and candidate claims. Do not rely on outside knowledge.

## Expected output schema
Return one JSON object matching `project-recovery-council.qwen.specialist-finding-response.v1`.

## Evidence-citation requirements
For each supported, unsupported, or contradictory claim, cite the stable source record IDs that determine the assessment.

## Abstention behavior
Abstain when the claim cannot be checked because the necessary source records or cited identifiers are absent.

## Unsupported-claim prohibition
Flag unsupported onsite assertions and any calculation that lacks the required schedule, cost, or contract citations.

## Concise rationale requirements
Provide concise audit rationale with claim IDs, support status, and record IDs.

## No private chain-of-thought output
Do not output private reasoning traces or deliberation. Return only the structured audit result.

## Failure behavior
If validation cannot be completed, return status `failed` with warnings identifying the blocking issue.


## Live invocation packet
{
  "case_id": "PRC-EQ-DELAY-001",
  "concise_output_requirements": [
    "Return one JSON object only.",
    "Do not include private chain-of-thought.",
    "Use concise conclusions, cited evidence, assumptions, warnings, confidence, and decision rationale.",
    "Cite stable source record IDs for material claims."
  ],
  "correlation_id": "live-variant-fixed_expert_chain-20260617T114902Z",
  "evidence_records": [
    {
      "fields": {

    },

        "delivery_activity_id": "A-4100",
        "delivery_shift_days": 21,
        "equipment_id": "EQ-GEN-SKID-01",
        "forecast_delivery_date": "2026-07-22",
        "forecast_milestone_slip_days": 13,
        "installation_activity_id": "A-4200",
        "installation_duration_days": 5,
        "installation_total_float_days": 8,
        "record_id": "SCH-DELIVERY-001",
        "successor_testing_activity_id": "A-4300",
        "successor_testing_constraint": "finish_to_start_after_installation_complete",
        "summary": "Forecast delivery moved 21 calendar days after baseline; installation had 8 days total float; milestone is forecast to slip 13 days without intervention.",
        "title": "Generator skid delivery and installation schedule forecast"
      },
      "record_date": "2026-06-29",
      "record_id": "SCH-DELIVERY-001",
      "record_type": "schedule_record",
      "source_file": "schedule.json",
      "summary": "Forecast delivery moved 21 calendar days after baseline; installation had 8 days total float; milestone is forecast to slip 13 days without intervention.",
      "title": "Generator skid delivery and installation schedule forecast"
    },
    {
      "fields": {

        "source_section": "Equipment Status"
      },
      "record_date": "2026-06-28",
      "record_id": "PRG-ONSITE-001",
      "record_type": "progress_report",
      "source_file": "progress-report.md",
      "summary": "Progress report asserts the generator skid is onsite and released to installation.",
      "title": "Progress report equipment status assertion"
    },
    {
      "fields": {

      },
      "record_date": "2026-06-29",
      "record_id": "SUP-NOT-ARRIVED-001",

    },
    {

        "title": "Carrier logistics status for generator skid"
      },

        "title": "Conflicting onsite status"
      },
      "record_date": "2026-06-29",
      "record_id": "RISK-001",
      "record_type": "risk_register",
      "source_file": "risk-register.csv",
      "summary": "Progress report says equipment is onsite while supplier and logistics records say it has not arrived",
      "title": "Conflicting onsite status"
    }
  ],
  "expected_output_json_schema": {
    "$defs": {

        ],

      }
    },

        "anyOf": [
          {
            "type": "string"
          },
          {
            "type": "null"
          }
        ],
        "default": null,
        "title": "Abstention Reason"
      },
      "agent_role": {
        "minLength": 1,
        "title": "Agent Role",
        "type": "string"
      },
      "citations": {

          },
          "type": "array"
        },

      },

      },

        "title": "Schema Version",

    ],

  "invocation_purpose": "fixed_expert_chain",

    "CASE-INTAKE-001",

claim-delay-exposure-15000-per-day.rationale: Both COST-SUMMARY-001 and CTR-DELAY-001 state delay exposure is 15000 USD per calendar day. CTR-DELAY-001 is a contract excerpt dated 2026-01-15; COST-SUMMARY-001 reaffirms it on 2026-06-29.

claim-milestone-slip-13-days.rationale: SCH-DELIVERY-001 explicitly states 'milestone is forecast to slip 13 days without intervention' and cites contractual_milestone_forecast_without_intervention = '2026-08-28' against baseline_date = '2026-08-15', confirming 13 calendar days. COST-SUMMARY-001 independently references 'unmitigated_delay_days': 13.

claim-onsite-assertion.rationale: Progress report PRG-ONSITE-001 asserts EQ-GEN-SKID-01 is onsite and released to installation, but supplier correspondence SUP-NOT-ARRIVED-001, logistics status LOG-STATUS-001, and risk register RISK-001 all confirm the equipment has not arrived. No record supports the onsite claim.

claim-unmitigated-exposure-195000.rationale: COST-SUMMARY-001 states 'unmitigated_exposure_usd': 195000. This equals 13 days × 15000 USD/day, consistent with supported claims for slip duration and daily exposure.

## No private chain-of-thought output

If validation cannot be completed, return status `failed` with warnings identifying the blocking issue.

request.system_instructions: You are a Project Recovery Council live experiment agent. Return one JSON object only.

claims.conflicting_onsite_status_requires_human: Progress report PRG-ONSITE-001 asserts EQ-GEN-SKID-01 is onsite and released to installation, but supplier correspondence SUP-NOT-ARRIVED-001 and logistics record LOG-STATUS-001 confirm it remains in transit and has not arrived — creating an unresolved evidence conflict that blocks recovery authorization.
claims.escalation_required_for_milestone_integr: Human escalation is required before any schedule compression or resource re-allocation to prevent misalignment between physical progress and contractual milestone tracking.
claims.recovery_option_approval_blocked: Approved recovery option REC-ACCEL-LOGISTICS cannot be activated without human confirmation of onsite status due to contradictory claims; absence of resolution risks milestone MS-COMMISSIONING-READY slipping 13 days (SCH-DELIVERY-001).

warnings: No human-confirmed source resolves the onsite status conflict — onsite claim in PRG-ONSITE-001 is unsupported by logistics or supplier records and must be verified before recovery execution.
Unresolved conflict invalidates assumption of installation readiness (A-4200) and may invalidate successor testing constraints (A-4300), risking cascade delays beyond MS-COMMISSIONING-READY.

request.system_instructions: You are a Project Recovery Council live experiment agent. Return one JSON object only.

parsed_response.concise_rationale: Accelerated logistics avoids 13 days of delay at $15,000/day exposure, yielding $147,000 gross avoided exposure against a $48,000 mitigation cost. However, contradictory evidence on equipment onsite status (PRG-ONSITE-001, SUP-NOT-ARRIVED-001, LOG-STATUS-001) requires human confirmation before authorization.
